message:
🌱 Add fluentd: Configuration as yaml/json mission (#1761)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluentd-554-configuration-as-yaml-json",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluentd: Configuration as yaml/json",
+    "description": "Configuration as yaml/json. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current fluentd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your fluentd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nhelm list -n fluentd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working fluentd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluentd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluentd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl get configmap -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluentd\n```\nI've been trying to setup a FluentD puppet module that is able to build configuration from resource calls, however, the configuration syntax makes this very difficult."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Configuration as yaml/json",
+        "description": "From this spec, puppet-fluentd supports `<server>` sections: https://github.com/mmz-srf/puppet-fluentd/blob/develop/spec/defines/fluentd_match_spec.rb#L33\nIf `secondary` doesn't work, then adding `secondary` support to puppet-fluentd is good for other users.\n\nHm... supporting yaml instead of DSL\n```yaml\nfluentd::match:\n    pattern: 'nginx.*'\n    priority: 10\n    options:\n      type: copy\n      store:\n       - type: 'file'\n         path: '/var/log/fluent/myapp'\n         time_slice_format: '%Y%m%d'\n         time_slice_wait: '10m'\n         time_format: '%Y%m%dT%H%M%S%z'\n         compress: 'gzip'\n       - type: 'mongo'\n         host: 'fluentd'\n         port: '27017'\n         database: 'fluentd'\n         collection: 'test'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl get events -n fluentd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Configuration as yaml/json\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "From this spec, puppet-fluentd supports `<server>` sections: https://github.com/mmz-srf/puppet-fluentd/blob/develop/spec/defines/fluentd_match_spec.rb#L33\nIf `secondary` doesn't work, then adding `secondary` support to puppet-fluentd is good for other users.\n\nHm... supporting yaml instead of DSL may be a good idea for this problem.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "fluentd::match:\n    pattern: 'nginx.*'\n    priority: 10\n    options:\n      type: copy\n      store:\n       - type: 'file'\n         path: '/var/log/fluent/myapp'\n         time_slice_format: '%Y%m%d'\n         time_slice_wait: '10m'\n         time_format: '%Y%m%dT%H%M%S%z'\n         compress: 'gzip'\n       - type: 'mongo'\n         host: 'fluentd'\n         port: '27017'\n         database: 'fluentd'\n         collection: 'test'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluentd",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluentd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/issues/554",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluentd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-26T06:32:33.642Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",

+}
